message:
fix(btree,core,mvcc,pager,vdbe): cursor bounds, conflict retry, and pager housekeeping

- btree/cursor.rs: tighten bounds checking in cursor positioning
  to prevent accessing cells beyond the valid range
- core/connection.rs: simplify redundant match arms in query
  execution path
- mvcc/begin_concurrent.rs: expand conflict retry logic with
  finer-grained backoff and additional safety checks for
  concurrent transaction conflicts
- pager/pager.rs: minor cleanup in page cache management
- vdbe/engine.rs: refine comparison opcode handling for edge
  cases in the virtual machine execution loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
